newsletters.subject: Forget Agent Skills
newsletters.rationale: Directly relevant to the wiki's core topic of AI agents. The provocative title 'Forget Agent Skills' suggests a contrarian take on agent architecture — possibly arguing against skill-based agent design patterns (which is how many current agent frameworks work). Hugo Bowne-Anderson is a respected data science educator and podcaster. This could provide a useful counterpoint perspective for wiki coverage of agent architectures.
